R : Type u
S : Type v
T : Type w
a b : R
n : ℕ
inst✝¹ : CommRing R
p✝ q : R[X]
inst✝ : Semiring S
p mod : R[X]
⊢ (if hq : mod.Monic then
      (if h : mod.degree ≤ (-p).degree ∧ -p ≠ 0 then
          let z := C (-p).leadingCoeff * X ^ ((-p).natDegree - mod.natDegree);
          let_fun _wf := ⋯;
          let dm := (-p - mod * z).divModByMonicAux hq;
          (z + dm.1, dm.2)
        else (0, -p)).2
    else -p) =
    -if hq : mod.Monic then
        (if h : mod.degree ≤ p.degree ∧ p ≠ 0 then
            let z := C p.leadingCoeff * X ^ (p.natDegree - mod.natDegree);
            let_fun _wf := ⋯;
            let dm := (p - mod * z).divModByMonicAux hq;
            (z + dm.1, dm.2)
          else (0, p)).2
      else p
